title: bonaga arvensis
side_effects: Bonaga arvensis can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and stomach discomfort in individuals who consume it in large quantities. In some cases, excessive use of the plant can also lead to allergic reactions, including skin rashes and itching. Furthermore, improper preparation or dosage of bonaga arvensis can cause interactions with other medications, potentially resulting in adverse effects on the heart and respiratory system. It is essential to consult with a medical professional before using bonaga arvensis for medicinal purposes.
